KeyDeck Proof 0.11 — Universal Activity Timeline and Proof Receipts

This Windows x64 proof runner uses only local temporary files. It does not require a paid API key or external provider.

Run in PowerShell:

  .\KeyDeck-Proof-0.11.exe

Expected result:

  "passed": true

The proof validates durable cross-domain event identity, canonical ordering, restart deduplication, evidence-based human-readable receipts, secret rejection, and exactly-once receipt/proof-event persistence.
